'''Kras'dohk''' was a rogue [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the [[Time/Legends|time]] before the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A rare [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], Kras'dohk was raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] from infancy, [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi academy|academy]] there until he achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], and later, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Living in a time when the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] was suffering from schisms and wars with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], Kras'dohk departed from Coruscant and began a journey mission along the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that would cause him to lose contact with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

Separate from the goings-on within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Master Kras'dohk came across a Force-sensitive [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] named [[Kina Ha]] and offered to train the centuries old woman in the ways of the Jedi. Reporting back to the High Council about his new apprentice, the Order decided to recognize the woman's training and acknowledged her as a Knight once her training was completed, though they did not approve of him taking a Padawan. While Kina Ha went on to continue her master's mission of aiding the less fortunate on the Outer Rim, Master Kras'dohk succumbed to old age and became one with the Force.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
